/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/lob_server.dir/lob_server.cpp.o -o lob_server  _deps/drogon-build/libdrogon.a _deps/drogon-build/trantor/libtrantor.a -lrdkafka -L/opt/homebrew/opt/librdkafka/lib -lrdkafka++ _deps/prometheus-cpp-build/lib/libprometheus-cpp-core.a _deps/prometheus-cpp-build/lib/libprometheus-cpp-pull.a engine/liblob_core.a engine/liblob_util.a _deps/simdjson-build/libsimdjson.a -lpthread /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/c-ares/lib/libcares.dylib -lresolv -ldl /opt/homebrew/opt/jsoncpp/lib/libjsoncpp.dylib /opt/local/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /opt/local/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/local/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/local/lib/libsqlite3.dylib /opt/local/lib/libz.dylib -lpthread _deps/prometheus-cpp-build/lib/libprometheus-cpp-core.a /opt/local/lib/libz.dylib
